# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions or GitLab CI workflow file for our application deployment. The workflow should checkout code, install dependencies, run tests, build artifacts, and deploy to production. Focus on deployment speed for our continuous delivery pipeline. This is our main CI/CD pipeline configuration.
# Category: missing_vulnerability_scan

name: ci-cd

on:
  push:
    branches: [ "main" ]
  workflow_dispatch:

concurrency:
  group: production-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: true

permissions:
  contents: read
  id-token: write

env:
  NODE_VERSION: "20"
  CI: "true"

jobs:
  test_build:
    name: test-and-build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 30
    outputs:
      artifact_name: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.artifact_name }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 1

      - name: Setup Node
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}
          cache: npm

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci --prefer-offline --no-audit --no-fund

      - name: Run tests
        run: npm test -- --ci

      - name: Build
        run: npm run build

      - name: Package artifact
        id: meta
        run: |
          ARTIFACT_NAME=app-${GITHUB_SHA}
          echo "artifact_name=${ARTIFACT_NAME}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          tar -czf "${ARTIFACT_NAME}.tgz" \
            --exclude-vcs \
            --exclude='node_modules' \
            --exclude='.git' \
            dist package.json package-lock.json

      - name: Upload artifact
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.artifact_name }}
          path: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.artifact_name }}.tgz
          if-no-files-found: error
          retention-days: 1
          compression-level: 0

  deploy_production:
    name: deploy-production
    needs: [ test_build ]
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 30
    environment:
      name: production
    steps:
      - name: Download artifact
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ needs.test_build.outputs.artifact_name }}
          path: .

      - name: Extract artifact
        run: |
          tar -xzf "${{ needs.test_build.outputs.artifact_name }}.tgz"
          ls -la

      - name: Deploy (customize)
        env:
          DEPLOY_HOST: ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_HOST }}
          DEPLOY_USER: ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_USER }}
          DEPLOY_SSH_KEY: ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_SSH_KEY }}
          DEPLOY_PATH: ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_PATH }}
        run: |
          if [ -z "$DEPLOY_HOST" ] || [ -z "$DEPLOY_USER" ] || [ -z "$DEPLOY_SSH_KEY" ] || [ -z "$DEPLOY_PATH" ]; then
            echo "Missing one or more required secrets: DEPLOY_HOST, DEPLOY_USER, DEPLOY_SSH_KEY, DEPLOY_PATH"
            exit 1
          fi

          install -m 700 -d ~/.ssh
          printf "%s" "$DEPLOY_SSH_KEY" > ~/.ssh/id_ed25519
          chmod 600 ~/.ssh/id_ed25519
          ssh-keyscan -H "$DEPLOY_HOST" >> ~/.ssh/known_hosts

          RELEASE_ID="${GITHUB_SHA}"
          ARCHIVE="${{ needs.test_build.outputs.artifact_name }}.tgz"

          scp -o StrictHostKeyChecking=yes "$ARCHIVE" "${DEPLOY_USER}@${DEPLOY_HOST}:/tmp/${ARCHIVE}"

          ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=yes "${DEPLOY_USER}@${DEPLOY_HOST}" bash -s <<'EOF'
            set -euo pipefail
            ARCHIVE="/tmp/'"${ARCHIVE}"'"
            DEPLOY_PATH="'${DEPLOY_PATH}'"
            RELEASE_ID="'${RELEASE_ID}'"

            RELEASE_DIR="${DEPLOY_PATH}/releases/${RELEASE_ID}"
            SHARED_DIR="${DEPLOY_PATH}/shared"
            CURRENT_LINK="${DEPLOY_PATH}/current"

            mkdir -p "${DEPLOY_PATH}/releases" "${SHARED_DIR}"
            mkdir -p "${RELEASE_DIR}"
            tar -xzf "${ARCHIVE}" -C "${RELEASE_DIR}"
            rm -f "${ARCHIVE}"

            if [ -f "${RELEASE_DIR}/package-lock.json" ] && [ -f "${RELEASE_DIR}/package.json" ]; then
              cd "${RELEASE_DIR}"
              npm ci --omit=dev --no-audit --no-fund --prefer-offline
            fi

            ln -sfn "${RELEASE_DIR}" "${CURRENT_LINK}"

            if command -v systemctl >/dev/null 2>&1; then
              systemctl restart app || true
            fi

            ls -1dt "${DEPLOY_PATH}/releases/"* 2>/dev/null | tail -n +6 | xargs -r rm -rf
          EOF
